'''鈭歳-p-ng-th''' ('''karapngethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:beal|beal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-p-ng-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beal|beal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-p-ng-th
|-
! Lemma
| karapngethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirapngethoko|thirapngethoko]] || [[word:jirapngethoko|jirapngethoko]] || [[word:shirapngethoko|shirapngethoko]] || [[word:kirapngethoko|kirapngethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurapngethoko|thuthurapngethoko]] || [[word:jujurapngethoko|jujurapngethoko]] || [[word:shushurapngethoko|shushurapngethoko]] || [[word:kukurapngethoko|kukurapngethoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorapngethoko|thorapngethoko]] || [[word:jorapngethoko|jorapngethoko]] || [[word:shorapngethoko|shorapngethoko]] || [[word:korapngethoko|korapngethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorapngethoko|thorapngethoko]] || [[word:jorapngethoko|jorapngethoko]] || [[word:shorapngethoko|shorapngethoko]] || [[word:korapngethoko|korapngethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙rapngethoko|th忙rapngethoko]] || [[word:j忙rapngethoko|j忙rapngethoko]] || [[word:sh忙rapngethoko|sh忙rapngethoko]] || [[word:k忙rapngethoko|k忙rapngethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharapngethoko|thatharapngethoko]] || [[word:jajarapngethoko|jajarapngethoko]] || [[word:shasharapngethoko|shasharapngethoko]] || [[word:kakarapngethoko|kakarapngethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharapngethoko|tharapngethoko]] || [[word:jarapngethoko|jarapngethoko]] || [[word:sharapngethoko|sharapngethoko]] || [[word:karapngethoko|karapngethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharapngethoko|tharapngethoko]] || [[word:jarapngethoko|jarapngethoko]] || [[word:sharapngethoko|sharapngethoko]] || [[word:karapngethoko|karapngethoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
